plugins.name: planning-first
plugins.description: Plan before code. Forces a strict analyze → architect → plan → preview → approve → implement workflow with a hard stop for explicit approval before any code is written.

plugins.name: reverse-generation-prompt
plugins.description: Reverse-engineers a project into a self-contained knowledge package (PROJECT_BLUEPRINT.md + PROJECT_CONTEXT.json + reconstruction prompt) so any LLM can rebuild it with minimal loss.

plugins.name: it-prompt-specialist
plugins.description: Senior multidisciplinary IT expert lens across software engineering, infrastructure, cybersecurity, cloud, AI/ML, data, networking, embedded, game dev, and project management.
